mapper.sql: id, openid, union_id, session_key, nickname, avatar_url, phone, email, gender, status, last_login_time, last_login_ip, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM users WHERE openid = #{openid} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.date) FROM `transaction` t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.is_deleted = 0), 0) AS totalDays, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `transaction` t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.is_deleted = 0), 0) AS totalCount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN a.type = 'asset' OR a.type = 'investment' THEN COALESCE(a.initial_balance, 0) WHEN a.type = 'liability' THEN COALESCE(a.initial_balance, 0) ELSE 0 END ) FROM account a WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.is_deleted = 0 AND a.include_in_net_worth = 1), 0) AS netAsset
